query:
SELECT
                        n.id          AS "node_id!",
                        n.kind        AS "kind!",
                        nf.id         AS "folder_id!",
                        nf.display_name       AS "folder_name!",
                        n.created_at AS "created_at!",
                        n.updated_at AS "updated_at!"
                    FROM node               n
                    JOIN node_folder        nf  ON nf.node_id = n.id
                    WHERE n.kind = 'folder'
                    ORDER BY n.created_at
